title: oxalis cytisoides
intro: Oxalis cytisoides, also known as the Bermuda sorrel or wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the oxalis genus and is native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Oxalis cytisoides include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Oxalis cytisoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
